errors.appleCompat: Unable to update Apple compatibility settings.
errors.milestones: Unable to update birthday/anniversary calendar settings.
errors.privateWorkingSet: Unable to update private working set settings.
errors.privateWorkingSetPull: Unable to pull latest private working set source values.
errors.privateWorkingSetPromote: Unable to promote private working set change.
errors.privateWorkingSetDismiss: Unable to dismiss private working set suggestion.

overview.endpointHelper: Use this URL in client connection settings.
overview.roleHelper: Admins can manage users and cross-user sharing.

milestoneCalendars.title: Milestone Calendars
milestoneCalendars.syncDescription: When enabled, Davvy keeps generated milestone calendar events in sync with contact dates.
milestoneCalendars.syncDescriptionExtra: Turning off sync does not delete calendars unless you choose Delete.
milestoneCalendars.disablePrompt:
Turn off {{label}} milestone sync for {{name}}?

Press OK to delete the generated calendar.
Press Cancel to keep the calendar and only stop sync.

sharing.title: Share Your Resources
sharing.subtitle: Grant read-only, editor, or admin access for resources you own and marked as sharable. Admin access includes collection delete rights.

appleCompat.title: Apple Contacts Compatibility
appleCompat.subtitle: Off by default. Mirror selected address books into your main address book for better macOS Contacts visibility.
appleCompat.missingTarget: No default Contacts address book found for your account.
appleCompat.noSources: No eligible owned/shared address books available.

privateWorkingSet.title: Private Working Set
privateWorkingSet.subtitle: Keep your personal edits private first, then choose exactly what to share back.
privateWorkingSet.quickGuideStep1: 1) Edit shared contacts on your device. Davvy keeps those edits in your private copy first.
privateWorkingSet.quickGuideStep2: 2) Review suggested updates or linked cards and choose what to share back.
privateWorkingSet.quickGuideStep3Moderated: 3) Review queue moderation is ON, so promotions wait for approval.
privateWorkingSet.quickGuideStep3Direct: 3) Review queue moderation is OFF, so promotions apply right away.
privateWorkingSet.enable: Use private working set for shared contacts
privateWorkingSet.hideShared: Hide selected source books in my DAV apps
privateWorkingSet.hideSharedHint: Helps prevent accidental direct edits in shared source books from your phone/computer apps.
privateWorkingSet.includeOwnedSharableSources: Also include my own sharable address books
privateWorkingSet.includeOwnedSharableSourcesHint: Useful if you want your own books to follow the same private-edit and promote flow.
privateWorkingSet.requireReviewForSelfPromotions: Queue my own promotions for review
privateWorkingSet.requireReviewForSelfPromotionsHint: Admin only. When enabled, your own promotions are reviewed before they apply.
privateWorkingSet.requireSelfReviewModerationDisabled: Enable review queue moderation in Admin Settings to use this safeguard.
privateWorkingSet.nonAdminSelfReviewAlwaysQueued: Moderation is enabled, so your promotions are always queued for review.
privateWorkingSet.nonAdminSelfReviewModerationDisabled: Moderation is disabled globally, so your promotions apply directly.
privateWorkingSet.selfReviewPolicyDirectApply: Admin self-promotions are currently set to apply directly.
privateWorkingSet.sourcesHint: Select which source books are copied into your private working set.
privateWorkingSet.noSources: No eligible source address books yet. Ask an owner/admin to share a sharable address book with you.
privateWorkingSet.pull: Refresh from source books (keep my private edits)
privateWorkingSet.forcePull: Reset from source books (replace my private edits)
privateWorkingSet.linkedCardsTitle: Private cards linked to shared contacts
privateWorkingSet.linkedCardsHint: Use this when you want to share all current private changes for a contact.
privateWorkingSet.suggestedHint: These are safe, field-level differences you may want to share.

notices.privateWorkingSetPulled: Private working set pulled from shared sources.
notices.privateWorkingSetForcePulled: Private working set force-pulled from shared sources.
notices.privateWorkingSetPromoted: Private card promoted to shared source.
